untranslatable_reason: Pattern-based signal (descending triangle with deliberation pullback reversal pattern) cannot be precisely codified using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. Specific candle pattern recognition, triangle formation geometry, and author-silent reversal rate thresholds (37% closing price confirmation bull only) lack direct indicator equivalents. Donchian channels and pivot points used as proxies for breakout detection, but true pattern validation requires candlestick morphology analysis not available in indicator set.
translation_notes: Used Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) to approximate triangle breakout boundaries. Used body_pct > 0.5 to detect confirmation candle with sufficient body. Pivot points used for mean reversion exits. Context-dependent direction preserved to allow both long and short entries. 37% bull reversal rate noted but cannot be operationalized without multi-candle pattern recognition. Stop loss and hold period set conservatively as pattern-specific values were author-silent.
